title: A CS Professor on Why Slow Learning Wins in the AI Era | CU Boulder, Tom Yeh
summary: Tom Yeh argues that teaching AI through manual, mathematical foundations at human speed provides more durable skills than chasing latest tools. He contends that focusing on fundamentals rather than trendy frameworks helps practitioners survive hype cycles and that AI adoption requires human adaptation rather than the reverse.
